label: Diffusion and masked-generative language models

node.label: Diffusion and masked-generative language models
node.definition: Diffusion and masked-generative language models iteratively refine corrupted or partially masked token states instead of committing to a strictly left-to-right sequence.
node.why_it_matters: They expose parallel refinement, editing, and controllable generation patterns unavailable to ordinary causal decoding.
limitations: Discrete denoising schedules, likelihoods, variable length, and serving efficiency remain challenging.

dependencies.rationale: Diffusion and masked-generative language models extends or specializes the architecture family Diffusion & score-based models.
Diffusion and masked-generative language models extends or specializes the architecture family Transformers.
Diffusion and masked-generative language models is learned, selected, or evaluated using the objective family Masked prediction objectives.
Diffusion and masked-generative language models consumes, emits, or organizes information using Tokens, vocabularies & symbolic units.

Discrete denoising schedules, likelihoods, variable length, and serving efficiency remain challenging.
